channel.title: Coverage Changelog · Noridian Healthcare Solutions
channel.description: CMS coverage updates for Noridian Healthcare Solutions, LLC.

item.title: A55001: Billing and Coding: Urine Drug Testing
item.description: High-signal revision from CMS notes: Revision Effective Date: 06/01/2026 Under ICD-10-CM Codes That Support Medical Necessity: Added: F11.120, F12.10, F12.20, F12.21, F13.10, F13.20, F13.21, F14.10, F14.120, F14.20, F14.21, F15.10, F15.20, F15.21, F19.10...

item.title: L40255: Temporary Nontherapeutic Ambulatory Cardiac Monitoring Devices

item.title: A60279: Billing and Coding: Temporary Nontherapeutic Ambulatory Cardiac Monitoring Devices
